addresses.comment: FRT bonding curve contract — buy/sell FRT for TON. 19,604 unique users, $2.46M traded since Mar 12, 2026.

addresses.source: Contract's FORT jetton wallet [EQCPtZYq](https://tonviewer.com/EQCPtZYqRWaC_vlVur2erPswdlmeiiSwBwhorCffbuEfbP-r) confirmed via get_wallet_data (owner=this contract, master=FORT). Deployer [EQB5E8tp](https://tonviewer.com/EQB5E8tp3GLdG0G5tfuB1btv3h7fYiCrDW9AwmZydxAXAnXL) holds largest FRT position and funded FORT admin.
addresses.comment: FRT Merkle claim/airdrop contract. 2,176 claims from 2,166 unique addresses (Mar 18-22, 2026). Users submit Merkle proofs to claim FRT tokens.
